news.title: China's Zhipu is closing in on top U.S. AI models with Anthropic and OpenAI held back
news.description:
Zhipu's GLM 5.2 artificial intelligence model landed last week with the kind of Silicon Valley buzz that followed DeepSeek's launch last year.
The Chinese AI startup's new open source model has blown past every other open release and now sits within a percent…

news.title: Buy Nvidia at 2 am on a Sunday? How Indians can own tokenised US stocks and how they differ from traditional trading
news.description: Nvidia's stock surged over 1,000% since the ChatGPT release, becoming the world's most valuable company. Investors are now eyeing other AI chipmakers like Micron and Sandisk, while tokenized stocks offer a new way to invest in these companies.

news.title: The month Generative AI lost its mojo
news.description:
The month Generative AI lost its mojo
June is not over, and anything could still happen, but a lot already has.
“WeWork’s IPO fell apart.
I’ve been calling OpenAI the (possible) WeWork of AI for a long time.
I will not be surprised if their IPO plans fall apa…

news.title: Google Caps Meta’s Use of Gemini AI, Financial Times Reports
news.description: Google has placed limits on Meta Platforms Inc.’s use of its Gemini artificial intelligence models because it could not provide as much computing capacity as the social media company wanted, according to the Financial Times.

news.title: Where Will Nvidia Stock Be in 2030?
news.description: Nvidia (NVDA 1.42%) makes the chips behind most of the artificial intelligence (AI) build-out, and the payoff for its shareholders has been enormous. But lately a new worry has surfaced: What if AI spending is near its peak? That question has pushed the stock…

news.title: Google limits Meta’s use of its Gemini AI models, FT reports
news.description: Meta had sought more computing capacity than Google could provide, the Financial Times reports.

news.title: Google limits Meta's use of its Gemini AI models: Report
news.description: Google, owned by Alphabet, told Meta ‌around March ⁠it ⁠could not meet the full Gemini capacity the company had sought ​to purchase, the newspaper said, adding that the shortfall disrupted ​and delayed some of Meta's internal AI projects.

news.title: Use Android Auto? How to limit what information Gemini learns about you
news.description: Google's AI offers a lot of convenience in your car, but you're offering up a lot of sensitive information.

news.title: US close to allowing Anthropic to restore Fable 5 model, Axios reports - Reuters

news.title: US government prepares to restore access to Anthropic Fable 5 and Mythos models
news.description: The Trump administration is moving toward restoring access to Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 artificial intelligence models following a period of government-mandated restrictions. These high-performance models were previously taken offline or limited due to…

news.title: Should we fear an artificial intelligence bubble bust?
news.description: Recent swings in tech stocks are reviving fears of an AI bubble — and some experts warn that if it pops, the fallout could be bigger than anything Wall Street has ever seen.
